heading: ## Risk Matrix
body:
| Risk | Probability (1-5) | Impact (1-5) | Mitigation |
|------|-------------------|--------------|------------|
| Неопределённость τ₂ | 4 | 4 | Запланировать OP-T1 для прямой оценки |
| Неудача разделения α₂/β₂ in vivo | 3 | 5 | Принять reduced model (единый effective rate) |
| Отсутствие значимого вклада теломер в некоторых тканях | 2 | 3 | Ограничить область применения модели тканями с высоким turnover |
| Сложность получения single-cell Q-FISH данных | 3 | 3 | Использовать альтернативные методы (TIF assay + qPCR) |
| Статистическая мощность недостаточна для OP-T2 | 2 | 4 | Предусмотреть увеличение N в power analysis |

heading: ## Consortium / Partners
body: Potential partners: [Lab A – single-cell telomere imaging], [Lab B – mouse models], [Lab C – bioinformatics]. Formal agreements to be established after funding.

line_anchor: ## 1. Counter Identity and Integration within MCAOA
body: **Clarification:** The variable D₂ is defined as a tissue-average or population-average measure of telomere length deviation. The current model does not explicitly account for the distribution of telomere lengths within a cell population; this limitation is addressed in OP-T1.
**Note:** τ₂ is currently labeled as "Hypothesized (Very Poor)". A concrete plan for its estimation is provided in OP-T1, with a target timeline of within the first 12 months of the project.

replace: Effect size: expected α₂ contribution vs β₂ contribution. The test requires two-photon imaging or equivalent equipment for in vivo visualization.
